function getSnapPosition (mat, position)
  basic_position = deck_position[position]
  scale = mat.getScale()
  scaleFactor = scale.z / scale.x

  return {basic_position[1] * scaleFactor, basic_position[2], basic_position[3]}
end


card_rotations = {
  up = {0,0,0},
  right = {0,90,0},
  down = {0,180,0},
  left = {0,270,0}
}

function setMatSnapPoints(mat, scaleFactor)
  local inverseScale = 1 / (scaleFactor or 1)
  local snap_points = {
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "material"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "banished"),
      rotation = card_rotations["left"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "main"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "graveyard"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    }
  }

  local memory_start = -0.975 * inverseScale
  local memory_offset = 0.150 * inverseScale
  local memory_count = 14

  for memory_index = 0, memory_count - 1 do
    local memory_snap_point = {
      position = {
        memory_start + (memory_index * memory_offset),
        0,
        memory_row_z
      },
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      rotation_snap = true
    }
    table.insert(snap_points, memory_snap_point)
  end

  mat.setSnapPoints(snap_points)
  mat.interactable = false
end

function isFourPlayerMode()
    local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
    if not redMat then return true end
    local posX = redMat.getPosition().x
    return posX < -10
end

function isStillSwitching()
  local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
  if not redMat then return true end
  return redMat.isSmoothMoving()
end

function toggleBigMat(player, value, index)
    local mat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not mat then return end

    local handzone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
    if not handzone then return end

    local currentScale = mat.getScale().x
    local newScale = 22 - currentScale
    mat.setScale({newScale, 1, newScale})

    local pos = handzone.getPosition()
    pos.z = (pos.z > 0) and 57-pos.z or -57-pos.z
    handzone.setPosition(pos)
end

function togglePlayerCount()

    if isStillSwitching() then
      print ("Wait for switching to finish first!")
      return
    end


    local moveDistance = -20
    local hideDistance = -200
    shouldLock = false

    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      moveDistance = 20
      hideDistance = 200
      shouldLock = true
    end

    print("[INFO] Switching between 2p/4p mode")

    moveObjectX(playmats.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redLarge,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redSmall,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueLarge,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueSmall,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Blue, moveDistance)

    for _, bagGUID in pairs(bags) do
        --moveObjectX(bagGUID, moveDistance)
    end

    moveObjectX(playmats.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Purple, hideDistance)


    setObjectLock(lifecounters.greenLarge, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.greenSmall, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.purpleLarge, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.purpleSmall, shouldLock)


    moveObjectX(lifecounters.greenLarge, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.greenSmall, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.purpleLarge, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.purpleSmall, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Purple, hideDistance)
end

function moveObjectX(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function moveObjectToX(guid, targetX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = targetX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function setObjectLock(guid, locked)
  local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
  obj.setLock(locked)
end

function toggleVisibility(player, id)
  visibility = Global.UI.getAttribute(id, "visibility")
  visible = visibility:find(player.color) ~= nil
  if visible then
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility:gsub("|" .. player.color, ""))
  else
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility .. "|" .. player.color)
  end
end

target_playmat_width = 35.6

function setPlaymatImage(player, imageUrl)
    local player_color = player.color
    local guid = playmats[player_color]
    local originalObj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not originalObj then
        print("No playmat found for color: " .. player_color)
        return
    end

    if imageUrl=="" then
      return
    end

    -- Update the image
    local custom = originalObj.getCustomObject()
    custom.image = imageUrl
    originalObj.setCustomObject(custom)
    originalObj.reload()

    -- Wait a bit for reload, then re-fetch by GUID
    Wait.time(function()

            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if not obj then
                print("Waiting for object to reload...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            local bounds = obj.getBounds().size
            local actualWidth = bounds.x
            if actualWidth == 0 then
                print("Bounds not ready yet...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            -- Rescale X to match target width
            local currentScale = obj.getScale()
            local scaleFactor = target_playmat_width / actualWidth
            obj.setScale({
                x = currentScale.x * scaleFactor,
                y = currentScale.y,
                z = currentScale.z
            })

            setMatSnapPoints(obj, scaleFactor)
            return true  -- Done
    end, 0.5)
end

-- Simple trimming of leading/trailing spaces
local function trimSpaces(str)
    if str == nil then
      return ""
    end
    return str:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
end

local function randomGUID()
    local chars = '0123456789abcdef'
    local res = {}
    for i=1,6 do
        local rand = math.random(#chars)
        res[#res+1] = chars:sub(rand, rand)
    end
    return table.concat(res)
end

extraDecks = {
    references = {},
    token = {},
    generated = {},
    mastery = {}
}
shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false

function spawnDeck(name, cards, player, as_bag)
    if name == "references" or name == "token" or name == "generated" or name == "mastery" then
        for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
            table.insert(extraDecks[name], card)
            shouldSpawnExtraDecks=true
        end
        return -- Delay spawning until all are gathered
    end

    if name == "extra" then
        local combined = {}
        for _, group in pairs(extraDecks) do
            for _, card in ipairs(group) do
                table.insert(combined, card)
            end
        end
        cards = combined
    end

    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    local rotation = playmat.getRotation()
    local position = playmat.positionToWorld(getSnapPosition(playmat, name))
    local bounds = playmat.getBounds()

    local deck = getDeck(name, cards, player)
    if as_bag or name == "extra" then
        deck = getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
    end

    deck.Transform = deck.Transform or {}
    deck.Transform.posX = position.x
    deck.Transform.posY = playmat.getPosition().y + bounds.size.y + bounds.offset.y + 1
    deck.Transform.posZ = position.z
    deck.Transform.rotY = rotation.y

    return spawnObjectData({data = deck})
end

function getDeck(name, cards, player)
    global_offset = (global_offset % 30) + 1

    local sleeve = getSleeves(player)
    if name == "material" then
      sleeve = getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
    end


    local deckOffset = global_offset * 1000

    local deck_ids       = {}
    local custom_deck    = {}
    local contained_objs = {}

    local idx = 1
    for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
        local cardstomake = (card.quantity == 0 and 1) or (card.quantity or 1)

        for i = 1, cardstomake do
            local orientation = (card.orientation or ""):lower()
            local frontSide, backSide = nil, nil
            local hasOrientations = (type(card.orientations) == "table" and #card.orientations > 0)
            local isMultiState = false

            if hasOrientations then
                isMultiState = true
                local oppositeNeeded = (orientation == "front") and "back"
                    or (orientation == "back") and "front"
                    or nil

                if oppositeNeeded then
                    for b, alt in ipairs(card.orientations) do
                        if (alt.orientation==nil) or (type(alt.orientation) == "string"
                          and alt.orientation:lower() == oppositeNeeded) then
                            backSide = alt
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            if orientation == "front" and backSide then
                frontSide = card

            elseif orientation == "back" and backSide then
                -- the user put the back side in their deck so we'll just flip it for them
                frontSide = backSide
                backSide  = card
            end

            if isMultiState then
                local frontKey    = (deckOffset + idx)
                local backKey     = frontKey + 1
                local frontBackKey= backKey + 1
                local frontID     = frontKey * 100
                local backID      = backKey * 100
                local frontBackID = frontBackKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, frontID)


                local frontURL = frontSide.image or card_back
                local backURL  = backSide.image  or card_back

                -- This section is to work around a bug in TTS
                local altBackURL

                if backURL:find("shoutatyourdecks.com/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://[^/]+/images/", "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/")
                elseif backURL:find("api.gatcg.com/cards/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/", "https://shoutatyourdecks.com/images/")
                else
                    altBackURL = backURL
                end

                custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(backKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = altBackURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = backURL,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = false,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = frontSide.name or "(NoName)",
                    CardID   = frontID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(frontKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)]
                    },
                    States = {
                        ["2"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = backID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(backKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(backKey)]
                            }
                        },
                        ["3"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = frontSide.name .. " / " .. backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = frontBackID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(frontBackKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)]
                            }
                        }
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 3
            else
                local singleKey = deckOffset + idx
                local singleID  = singleKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, singleID)

                local faceUrl = card.image or card_back

                custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = faceUrl,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = card.name,
                    CardID   = singleID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(singleKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)]
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 1
            end
        end
    end

    if #contained_objs == 1 then
        contained_objs[1].Transform.rotZ = 180
        return contained_objs[1]
    else
        return {
            GUID = randomGUID(),
            Name = "Deck",
            Transform = {
                rotX = 360, rotY = 180, rotZ = 180,
                scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale
            },
            Nickname = name,
            DeckIDs = deck_ids,
            CustomDeck = custom_deck,
            ContainedObjects = contained_objs
        }
    end
end

function importDeck(player, value, index)
    local deck_text = ui_decklist_state[player.color]
    deck_text = trimSpaces(deck_text)

    if deck_text == "" then
        broadcastToColor("No Decklist URL provided!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^https?://") then
        importDeckFromURL(deck_text, player, value, index)
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^{") then
      local json = JSON.decode(deck_text)
      if json then
          if json.error == nil then
              SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
              return
          end
      end
    end

    broadcastToColor("Invalid deck input! Provide a valid JSON decklist or a URL.", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function importDeckFromURL(deck_url, player, value, index)

  if deck_url ~= nil and deck_url:len() > 0 then
    if deck_url:sub(1, 5) ~= "https" then
      deck_url = "https://" .. deck_url
    end
    -- Silvie
    if deck_url:find("silvie.org") ~= nil or deck_url:find("silv.ie") then
        if deck_url:find("format=json") == nil then
            if deck_url:find("?") == nil then
              deck_url = deck_url .. "?format=json"
            else
              deck_url = deck_url .. "&format=json"
            end
        end
    elseif deck_url:find("shoutatyourdecks.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/decks/", "/api/")
    elseif deck_url:find("silvie.gg") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist%?deck=", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist/", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
    elseif deck_url:find("jsonblob.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("jsonblob.com/", "jsonblob.com/api/jsonBlob/")
    elseif deck_url:find("fractalofin.site") ~= nil then
        local event_id, player_id

        local patterns = {
            { pattern = "/player/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)", swap = true  }, -- player page
            { pattern = "#deck_(%d+)_(%d+)",             swap = false }, -- card/archetype page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)",    swap = false },  -- event page
        }

        for _, entry in ipairs(patterns) do
            local first, second = deck_url:match(entry.pattern)
            if first and second then
                player_id = entry.swap and tonumber(first) or tonumber(second)
                event_id = entry.swap and tonumber(second) or tonumber(first)
                break
            end
        end

        if event_id and player_id then
            deck_url = "https://fractalofin.site/tts/event_" .. event_id .. "/" .. player_id .. ".json"
        else
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Fractalofin URL format!", player.color, {255,0,0})
            return
        end
    else
        broadcastToColor("Invalid Decklist URL!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    WebRequest.get(deck_url, function(req)
      if req.is_error then
        log(request.error)
      else
        json = JSON.decode(req.text)
        if json.error ~= nil then
          log(json.error)
          if json.error == "silvie/bad-request" then
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Silvie.org Decklist!", player.color, {255,0,0})
          else
            broadcastToColor("Unknown Error :(", player.color, {255,0,0})
          end
        else
          -- Generate Cards
          for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
            if #cards > 0 then
              local obj = spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
              -- temporarily disabled
              if obj and deck:lower() == "main" then
                local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player.color]
                local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
                if marker then
                  local playmatGUID = playmats[player.color]
                  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)

                  if playmat then
                    local rot = playmat.getRotation()
                    marker.setRotation(rot)
                    if(rot.y>90) then
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(6, 0, 0))
                    else
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-6, 0, 0))
                    end
                  end

                  marker.setName("Not Shuffled Marker")
                  marker.setVar("ownerColor", player.color)
                end
              end
            end
          end
          if shouldSpawnExtraDecks then
            spawnDeck("extra", {}, player, true)
          end
          extraDecks = {
              references = {},
              token = {},
              generated = {},
              mastery = {}
          }
          shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false
          deleteBoardedCopies(player.color)
          createBoardedCopies(player.color)
        end
      end
    end)
  end
end

function findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, name_fragment)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

    -- Try first by name matching
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        local pos = obj.getPosition()
        if obj.tag == "Deck"
        and obj.getName():lower():find(name_fragment:lower())
        and isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
            return obj
        end
    end

    -- If no deck with matching name, fallback to position check

    local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())
    if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

    local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

    -- Find closest deck to the expected snap point
    local bestDeck = nil
    local bestDist = 1 -- usually like 0.3ish

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local dist = (obj.getPosition() - targetPos):magnitude()
            if dist < bestDist then
                bestDeck = obj
                bestDist = dist
            end
        end
    end

    return bestDeck
end

function sideboardingSnapshot(container)
    if not container or container.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
        local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "main")
        local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")

        if container == mainDeck or container == matDeck then
            local mainSize = mainDeck and #mainDeck.getObjects() or 0
            local matSize = matDeck and #matDeck.getObjects() or 0

            if mainSize >= deckcounts[color][2] and matSize == deckcounts[color][1] then
                deleteBoardedCopies(color)
                createBoardedCopies(color)
            end

            break
        end
    end
end

function createBoardedCopies(player_color)
    local marker = getObjectFromGUID(notshuffledmarkers[player_color])
    if not marker then return end
    local markerPos = marker.getPosition()

    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    if mainDeck then
        deckcounts[player_color][2] = math.max(60, #mainDeck.getObjects())
        local mainClone = mainDeck.clone({
            position = markerPos + Vector(-200, 2, 0),
            snap_to_grid = false
        })
        mainClone.setName("Saved Copy: ".. player_color .." Main")
        mainClone.setVar("ownerColor", player_color)
        mainClone.setLock(true)
    end

    local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "material")
    if matDeck then
        --deckcounts[player_color][1] = #matDeck.getObjects()
        local matClone = matDeck.clone({
            position = markerPos + Vector(-204, 2, 0),
            snap_to_grid = false
        })

function performResetFlourish(player, deck, sleeve_url)
    if not deck or deck.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    local count = #deck.getObjects()
    if count < 3 then return end

    local center = deck.getPosition()
    local radius = 5
    local fixedCount = 12
    local angleStep = (2 * math.pi) / fixedCount

    local total = math.min(count, 30)
    local cardsToAnimate = total - 2
    local animDuration = 0.5
    local delayPerCard = animDuration / cardsToAnimate

    for i = 1, cardsToAnimate do
        local angle = angleStep * i
        local offset = Vector(math.cos(angle) * radius, 2, math.sin(angle) * radius)
        local delay = (i - 1) * delayPerCard

        Wait.time(function()
            local ghost = spawnObject({
                type = "Card",
                position = center + offset,
                rotation = {0, 0, 180},
                scale = {0.95, 0.95, 0.95},
                sound = false

            })

            if ghost then
                ghost.setCustomObject({
                  face = sleeve_url,
                  back = sleeve_url
                })

                ghost.setLock(true)
                ghost.setName("Flourish")
                ghost.setDescription("")

                Wait.time(function()
                    ghost.setPositionSmooth(center + Vector(0, 2 + i * 0.1, 0), false, true)
                end, 0.2)

                Wait.time(function()
                    if ghost then ghost.destruct() end
                end, 1.0)
            end
        end, delay)
    end
end

function getBoundsOfDeckZone (player_color, zoneName)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  local localPos = getSnapPosition(playmat, zoneName)

  if playmat and localPos then

      local worldPos = playmat.positionToWorld(localPos)

      local halfSizeX = 2.0
      local halfSizeY = 2.0
      local halfSizeZ = 2.0

      local minBound = Vector(worldPos.x - halfSizeX, worldPos.y - halfSizeY, worldPos.z - halfSizeZ)
      local maxBound = Vector(worldPos.x + halfSizeX, worldPos.y + halfSizeY, worldPos.z + halfSizeZ)

      return minBound, maxBound

  end
end

function destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
  -- Iterate through all objects and delete only cards, dice, and tokens
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do

      local pos = obj.getPosition()
      local tag = obj.tag

      -- Check if the object is inside the playmat's area
      if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
          -- Delete only specific object types
          if tag == "Card" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "Infinite" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Deck" then
              obj.destroy()
          end
      end
  end
end

function getPlaymatBounds(color)
  local mat    = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
  local b, c   = mat.getBounds(), mat.getPosition()
  local hx, hy, hz = b.size.x/2, 50, b.size.z/2
  return Vector(c.x - hx, c.y - hy, c.z - hz), Vector(c.x + hx, c.y + hy, c.z + hz)
end

function wakeUpEverythingOnPlaymat(player, value, index)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds (player.color)
    local minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish = getBoundsOfDeckZone (player.color, "banished")

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" or obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local pos = obj.getPosition()

            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) and not isPointInBounds(pos, minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish) then

                local rot = obj.getRotation()
                local isFaceDown = rot.z > 90 and rot.z < 270

                local newRot = {
                    x = playmat.getRotation().x,
                    y = playmat.getRotation().y,
                    z = isFaceDown and 180 or 0
                }

                obj.setRotationSmooth(newRot)
            end
        end
    end
end

function isPointInBounds(point, minBound, maxBound)

  return point.x >= minBound.x and point.x <= maxBound.x and
     point.y >= minBound.y and point.y <= maxBound.y and
     point.z >= minBound.z and point.z <= maxBound.z
end

function reserveIntoMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local handGuid = playerhandzones[player.color]
    local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(handGuid)
    if not handZone then
        log("Hand Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- Find how many cards are already in the memory zone
    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local existingCount = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            existingCount = existingCount + 1
        end
    end

    local spacing = -3.2
    local initial = 9.5
    local cardsToMove = {}

    if (memPos.z <0) then
      spacing = spacing * -1
      initial = initial * -1
    end


    local handObjects = handZone.getObjects()
    if handObjects then
        for _, item in ipairs(handObjects) do
            if item.tag == "Card" then
                local rot = item.getRotation()
                if math.abs(item.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                    table.insert(cardsToMove, item)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
        local offset = existingCount + (i - 1)
        local pos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + offset%7 * spacing,
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        local quickPos = {
          x = (card.getPosition().x+pos.x)/2,
          y = (card.getPosition().y+pos.y+40)/2,
          z = (card.getPosition().z+pos.z)/2
        }
        card.setPosition(quickPos)
        card.setPositionSmooth(pos)
    end
end

function reorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local cardsInMemory = {}

    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            table.insert(cardsInMemory, obj)
        end
    end

    local count = #cardsInMemory
    if count == 0 then return end

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing  -- distance for 7 cards is 6 * 3.2 = 19.2
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and -1 or 1
    local initial = (memPos.z > 0) and -9.5 or 9.5

    -- if count <= 7, use normal spacing; else shrink spacing so they all fit within the same total width
    local effectiveSpacing
    if count <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (count - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        -- place them from left to right
        local offset = i - 1
        local finalPos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + (offset * effectiveSpacing),
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

function reserveAndReorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local handGuid = playerhandzones[player.color]
    local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(handGuid)
    if not handZone then
        log("Hand Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- 1) Collect cards currently in memory
    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local memoryCards = {}
    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            table.insert(memoryCards, obj)
        end
    end
    local memCount = #memoryCards

    -- 2) Collect facedown cards in the hand
    local handObjects = handZone.getObjects()
    local cardsToMove = {}
    if handObjects then
        for _, item in ipairs(handObjects) do
            if item.tag == "Card" then
                local rotZ = math.abs(item.getRotation().z)
                if rotZ > 90 then
                    table.insert(cardsToMove, item)
                end
            end
        end
    end
    local handCount = #cardsToMove

    -- 3) Figure out total cards after addition
    local totalCount = memCount + handCount

    -- 4) Smooth-move the existing memory cards so they fit totalCount
    reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, totalCount)

    local waitTime = (memcount==0) and 0 or 0.5

    -- 5) Wait a moment for the smooth-move to finish, then place new cards
    Wait.time(function()
        for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
            local offset = memCount + (i - 1)
            local finalPos = getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, totalCount)
            local quickPos = {
                x = (card.getPosition().x + finalPos.x) / 2,
                y = (card.getPosition().y + finalPos.y + 40) / 2,
                z = (card.getPosition().z + finalPos.z) / 2
            }
            card.setPosition(quickPos)
            card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
        end
    end, waitTime)  -- Adjust delay if needed
end

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Reorganize existing memory cards for a future total
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function reorganizeMemoryForTotal(cardsInMemory, memPos, futureTotal)
    if #cardsInMemory == 0 then return end

    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    table.sort(cardsInMemory, function(a, b)
      return a.getPosition().x*spacingSign < b.getPosition().x*spacingSign
    end)

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local ySpacing = 0.05
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing


    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    -- same centered layout logic
    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initial = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    local yPos = memPos.y + 1
    local zPos = memPos.z

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        local offset = (i - 1)
        local finalPos = {
            x = initial + offset * effectiveSpacing,
            y = yPos + offset * ySpacing,
            z = zPos
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Calculate final position for a new card offset
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, futureTotal)
    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initialX = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    return {
        x = initialX + offset * effectiveSpacing,
        y = memPos.y + 2,
        z = memPos.z
    }
end

function waitToSwitchState(obj, newState)
    Wait.condition(
        function()
            if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                obj.setState(newState)
            end
        end,
        function()
            return not obj.isSmoothMoving()
        end
    )
end

function getLastStateIndex(obj)
  local states = obj.getStates()
  if states ~= nil then
    return #states+1
  end
  return 1
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" then
        if obj.getStateId() == getLastStateIndex(obj) then
          if zone.getName() == "Field" then
              if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
              end
          end
        end
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.getStateId() ~= 1 then
        if zone.getName() == "MaterialDeckZone" then
            waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
        end
    end
end

function onObjectDrop(player_color, droppedObject)
    -- First: if they dropped a Quick Actions Panel itself, ignore
    if droppedObject.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
        return
    end

    -- Bottoming cards or decks
    if droppedObject.tag == "Card" or droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
            if obj.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
                if obj.getScale().x ~= 1.0 then
                    local quickBottomPosition = obj.positionToWorld({4,0,0})
                    local distance = (droppedObject.getPosition() - quickBottomPosition):magnitude()
                    if distance < 2.5 then
                        handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
                        return
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Auto-rename decks dropped onto playmat
    if droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
        if playmat then



            local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone(player_color, "main")
            local pos = droppedObject.getPosition()
            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then

                local name = droppedObject.getName()
                if not name:lower():find("main") then
                    droppedObject.setName(name .. "main")
                end
            end

        end
    end
end



function handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
    local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    if not deck then
        broadcastToColor("Cannot find your main deck!", player_color, {1,0,0})
        return
    end

    local deckPos = deck.getPosition()
    local liftedPos = deckPos + Vector(0, 6, 0)  -- Lift even higher

    -- Step 1: Lock and Lift the deck
    deck.setLock(true)
    deck.setPositionSmooth(liftedPos, false, true)

    Wait.time(function()
        -- Flip face-up cards face-down
        if not droppedObject.is_face_down then
            droppedObject.flip()
        end
        -- Step 2: Move dropped object under deck
        droppedObject.setPositionSmooth(deckPos + Vector(0, 1, 0), false, true)


        Wait.time(function()
            -- Step 3: Move deck back down
            deck.setPositionSmooth(deckPos, false, true)

            -- Step 4: After short delay, unlock the deck
            Wait.time(function()
                deck.setLock(false)

                -- Step 5: Correct the name afterward
                Wait.time(function()
                    local newDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
                    if newDeck then
                        local name = newDeck.getName()
                        if not name:lower():find("main") then
                            newDeck.setName(name .. "main")
                        end
                    end
                end, 0.5)

            end, 0.6)

        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.5)

end

function linkToDeckBottom(player, value, index)
  broadcastToColor("Drop cards here to send them to the bottom of your main deck!", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function onPlayerAction(player, action, targets)
    if action == Player.Action.FlipOver then
        local fieldGUID = playerfields[player.color]
        if not fieldGUID then return end

        for _, obj in ipairs(targets) do
            if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.getStateId() ~= getLastStateIndex(obj) and math.abs(obj.getRotation().z) < 90 then
                local zones = obj.getZones() or {}
                for _, zone in ipairs(zones) do
                    if zone.guid == fieldGUID then
                        waitToSwitchState(obj, getLastStateIndex(obj))
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function onGenerateCardButtonPressed(player)
    local url = self.Browser.url

    if not url:match("^https://grand%-archive%.tools/card/") then
        log("I can only generate cards from https://grand-archive.tools/card/<slug>")
        self.Browser.url = "https://grand-archive.tools/tts_search/"
        return
    end

    local jsonUrl = url .. "/json"

    WebRequest.get(jsonUrl, function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            log(request.error)
        elseif request.response_code == 204 then
            log("No card was found for URL: " .. url)
        elseif request.response_code == 200 then
            local jsonBlob = '{"cards": {"spawn": [' ..  request.text .. ']}}'

            local cardData = JSON.decode(jsonBlob)
            
            if not cardData or not cardData.cards then
                log("Invalid JSON.")
            end

            local deckObjectData = Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
                json  = cardData,
                player = player
            })

        else
            log("Unknown issue retrieving card data from: " .. jsonUrl)
        end
    end)
end

function onPlayerAction(player, action, targets)
    if action == Player.Action.FlipOver then
        for _, obj in ipairs(targets) do
            if obj.tag == "GoPiece" then
              rotation = self.UI.getAttribute("quick_action_grid", "rotation")
              --local oldRotationY = string.gsub(string.gsub(rotation, "0 ", ""), " 0", "")
              local objectRotationZ = obj.getRotation().z
              self.UI.setAttribute("quick_action_grid", "rotation", "0 " .. (180-objectRotationZ) .. " 0"  )
            end
        end
    end
end

function onLoad()
    for mode, _ in pairs(status_token_modes) do
        self.addContextMenuItem("Switch to " .. mode, function() setTokenImage(mode) end)
    end
end

function setTokenImage(mode)
    local custom = self.getCustomObject()
    custom.face = status_token_modes[mode]
    self.setCustomObject(custom)
    self.setName(mode .. " Token")
    self.reload()
end
